case_title: EMMANUEL CHAUSSON VS. D2D ENTERTAINMENT, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-31-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT D2D ENTERTAINMENT, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-05-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EMMANUEL CHAUSSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT D2D ENTERTAINMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GINA MILANO MANAGER. PARTIES MUST SUBMIT SUPPORTING EVIDENCE TO EACH OTHER BY JUL-25-2019 AND SUBMIT TO THE COURT NO LATER THAN AUG-01-2019. THIS CASE WILL BE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON AUG-05-2019. NO APPEAR IS REQUIRED ON AUG-05-2019. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2019 BY MICHELE MCGILL. NO APPEARANCES REQUIRED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. . PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHAUSSON, EMMANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT D2D ENTERTAINMENT, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: NICHOLAS E DONOVAN) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAUSSON, EMMANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT D2D ENTERTAINMENT, LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAUSSON, EMMANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT D2D ENTERTAINMENT, LLC
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $10,090.00 AS TO DEFENDANT D2D ENTERTAINMENT, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT D2D ENTERTAINMENT, LLC
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY CHAUSSON, EMMANUEL D2D ENTERTAINMENT, LLC
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE SUBMITTED FROM GINA MI LANO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAUSSON, EMMANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT D2D ENTERTAINMENT, LLC $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00, PLAINTIFF PROVIDED PROOF OF AGREED RATES OF $400/200 PER EVENT AND THAT SERVICES WERE RENDERED AS AGREED FROM 11/02/2016 TO 05/27/2017. PLAINTIFF TERMINATED SERVICES FOR NON-PAYMENT ON JUNE 8, 2017. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
